issues.title: org.springframework.web.client.ResourceAccessException: I/O error on POST request for "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/chat/completions": Timeout on blocking read for 5000000000 NANOSECONDS
issues.body:
` ChatResponse chatResponse = chatClient.prompt(new Prompt(List.of(SystemMessage.builder().text("you are a teacher").build(), UserMessage.builder().text("please,tell me something").build()))).call().chatResponse();`

I've tried a lot of manufacturers' models, and I've got this error.
